objective: Enable parallel tool call support end-to-end in the opencodex proxy (dev branch), grounded in the 2026-07-09 Tier-3 research. WP1: openai-chat parseStream assembles streamed tool_calls by index+id (interleaved deltas, id-only-first-chunk continuation, whole-chunk xAI calls) with zero argument cross-contamination and no single-call regression, plus focused tests. WP2: provider opt-in wiring - registry parallelToolCalls flag (xai on, zai off), request body stops forcing parallel_tool_calls:false for opted-in providers, catalog advertises supports_parallel_tool_calls for opted-in providers (cursor unchanged), assistant tool_calls content null-to-empty-string hardening. WP3: integration verification - full bun test suite, typecheck, SoT/docs sync, final adversarial review. Scope: src/adapters/openai-chat.ts, src/providers/registry.ts, src/codex/catalog.ts, src/types.ts (events only), tests/*, devlog. OUT: cursor/anthropic/google/kiro adapters, gui, docs-site. DONE = new tests + full suite + typecheck all pass with fresh evidence. Budget: max 4 PABCD work-phases, ~90min, subagents gpt-5.5 only.

workPhases.title: Stream-parser multi-call assembly in openai-chat parseStream

tasks.title: Rework parseStream tool_calls handling: index+id keyed assembly, interleave-safe, id-only-first-chunk tolerant
Flush semantics: emit completed calls sequentially; finish_reason/stream-end flush all open calls
Focused tests: interleaved deltas, id-continuation, whole-chunk multi-call, single-call regression

workPhases.title: Provider opt-in wiring: registry flag, request body, catalog bit, content hardening

tasks.title: Registry: parallelToolCalls capability flag; xai=true, others unchanged
openai-chat buildRequest: honor flag instead of unconditional parallel_tool_calls=false
Catalog: supports_parallel_tool_calls=true for opted-in providers, cursor path unchanged
Assistant tool_calls history: content null -> empty string hardening
Tests for request-body flag per provider and catalog bit per provider
Full bun test suite + typecheck with fresh output
SoT/docs sync (structure/ or equivalent) for the new capability flag
Final adversarial review by gpt-5.5 reviewer on the whole diff
